16.kj: [idiom] at all, [idiom] crying, (be) dead (body, man, one), (put to, worthy of) death, destroy(-er), (cause to, be like to, must) die, kill, necro(-mancer), [idiom] must needs, sla

16.gl: properly, like this, i.e. by implication, (of manner) thus (or so); also (of place) here (or hither); or (of time) now
16.kj: also, here, + hitherto, like, on the other side, so (and much), such, on that manner, (on) this (manner, side, way, way and that way), + mean while, yonder.
16.dv: from the prefix k and H1931 (הוּא);

17.gl: to die (literally or figuratively); causatively, to kill
17.kj: [idiom] at all, [idiom] crying, (be) dead (body, man, one), (put to, worthy of) death, destroy(-er), (cause to, be like to, must) die, kill, necro(-mancer), [idiom] must needs, sla

17.gl: a year (as a revolution of time)
Chananjah, the name of thirteen Israelites
17.dv: or חֲנַנְיָהוּ; from H2603 (חָנַן) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has favored;

17.gl: the new moon; by implication, a month
